heading: Supporting United States educational and exchange programs with Taiwan
label: 3388 Supporting United States educational and exchange programs with Taiwan

children.heading: Establishment of the United States-Taiwan cultural exchange foundation
children.label: a Establishment of the United States-Taiwan cultural exchange foundation

children.text: is dedicated to deepening ties between the future leaders of Taiwan and the future leaders of the United States; and

works with State and local school districts and educational institutions to send high school and university students to Taiwan to study the Chinese language, culture, history, politics, and other relevant subjects.

children.heading: Partner
children.label: b Partner
children.text: State and local school districts and educational institutions, including public universities, are encouraged to partner with the Taipei Economic and Cultural Representative Office in the United States to establish programs to promote more educational and cultural exchanges.
